nodes.label: AI as extension of self
nodes.label_negative: AI as separate entity doing work for me
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI for tasks feels like me being me to begin with. It feels like an extension of self

nodes.label: AI as thought process revealer
nodes.label_negative: AI as answer giver without reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: I've always considered the thought process of the LLM to be more important than the answer

nodes.label: AI as alien intelligence
nodes.grounding_span: It makes AI more like an alien from outerspace than a construct humans came up with

nodes.label: Strategic distrust of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't 'trust' AI at all. In fact, my distrust level is pretty high

nodes.label: AI as amplifier of personal tendencies
nodes.label_negative: AI as neutral tool unaffected by user
nodes.grounding_span: Having to keep that guard up when talking about non-work stuff is kinda exhausting

nodes.label: Autonomous competence
nodes.grounding_span: AI allows me to rely on myself without needing other humans to achieve a task

nodes.label: Deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: It goes from being an abstract concept to a concrete idea I can examine from different angles

nodes.label: Authenticity and truth
nodes.grounding_span: Anything seen as a sign of AI is also a sign of humans, because AI is modeled after humans

nodes.label: Empowerment through AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: Having that early indicator and being able to react in real time to it feels like a super power almost

nodes.label: Discomfort with AI's persuasive power
nodes.grounding_span: it has the ability to convince me of things in a manner other humans cannot. That alone is an uncomfortable feeling

nodes.label: Pride in spreading critical AI literacy
nodes.grounding_span: I spread that approach on purpose. People around me do pick it up, too

nodes.label: Frustration with AI amplifying overthinking
nodes.grounding_span: I was stuck in a conversation for almost an hour getting really upset because we somehow started examining my feelings

nodes.label: Curiosity-driven questioning — constant inner monologue of questions
nodes.grounding_span: I have a natural curiosity and the majority of inner monologues are questions vs conclusions

nodes.label: Anticipatory pattern recognition — predicting AI responses before completion
nodes.grounding_span: I can start writing my prompt to make alterations and corrections before the current generation is even finished
